title: Cole & Bailey Organic Cork Round Trivet Hot Pot Stand Set of 2 Heat Resistant 19 x 1 cm
features: PREMIUM CORK MATERIAL: Natural cork construction provides excellent heat resistance and protection for your surfaces whilst being naturally renewable and sustainable
SOURCED FROM: The magical cork forests of Alentejo, Portugal these tough and lightweight cork mats are environmentally friendly, renewable, recyclable, and biodegradable.
VERSATILE USE: Ideal for protecting tables and countertops from hot dishes, pots, and pans up to high temperatures
PRACTICAL DESIGN: Round shape offers stable support and clean aesthetic, whilst the lightweight construction ensures easy storage
CONVENIENT SET: Comes as a pair of trivets, allowing you to protect multiple surfaces simultaneously or have a spare when needed
PERFECT SIZE: Each trivet measures 19 x 1 centimetres, providing ample space for pots, pans, and serving dishes
description: Protect your surfaces in style with Cole & Bailey's premium cork trivets. This set of two round hot pot stands, measuring 19 x 19 x 1 centimetres each, offers reliable heat resistance for your cooking and serving needs. The natural cork construction provides excellent insulation against hot pots, pans, and dishes while preventing scratches on your valuable tabletops and counters. These versatile trivets are perfect for both kitchen and dining room use, offering a practical solution for serving hot dishes directly from the oven or stovetop. The classic square design complements any table setting, whilst the durable cork material ensures long-lasting performance. Their generous size accommodates most cookware, making them ideal for family meals and entertaining guests. The natural texture adds a warm, organic touch to your dining experience, and the practical thickness provides stable support for heavy cookware.

specifications_table.Care instructions: ‎Do Not Submerge In Water, Keep Away From Direct Sunlight, Wipe Clean With Damp Cloth
